name: FabricCatalystUpdateFromGit
description: Syncs a Fabric workspace from its connected Git branch, optionally binds semantic models to connections, and runs post-sync notebooks (e.g. row-level security setup).
author: TechTacoFriday

inputs.name: azureSubscription
inputs.label: Azure Subscription
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure service connection with access to the Fabric tenant. Used to obtain tokens for the Fabric and Microsoft Graph APIs.

inputs.name: workspaceName
inputs.label: Workspace Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the Fabric workspace to update.

inputs.name: isWorkspaceGitEnabled
inputs.label: Workspace is Git-enabled
inputs.helpMarkDown: Set to true when the workspace already has a Git connection configured. Patches the Git credentials and runs updateFromGit. Leave false to skip the Git sync step.

inputs.name: fabricGitConnectionName
inputs.label: Fabric Git Connection Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the Fabric Git connection to use when patching Git credentials. Only required when 'Workspace is Git-enabled' is true.

inputs.name: semanticModelsBinding
inputs.label: Semantic Model Bindings
inputs.helpMarkDown: JSON array mapping model names to connection names. Use '*' as a wildcard to bind all remaining models to a connection. Example: [{"modelName":"*","cnnName":"my-connection"}]

inputs.name: folderName
inputs.label: Notebooks Folder Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the workspace folder containing notebooks to run after the sync (e.g. row-level security setup). All notebooks in the folder are executed in order.

inputs.name: enableDiagnostics
inputs.label: Enable Diagnostics
inputs.helpMarkDown: Outputs detailed diagnostic messages to the pipeline log. Use for troubleshooting only.
